comments.comment: Releases previously accounted for as fugitive were reclassified as point source - which includes area heating, etc. Mobile diesel usage was previously accounted for under stationary equipment at the Site. This is no longer the practice as mobile diesel emissions are out of scope for NPRI reporting.

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: The facility did not undertake any official pollution prevention activities as defined above, but takes measures to reduce water, electricity and natural gas usage, and reviews opportunities to do so on a regular basis.

comments.comment: Variability in ore composition as borers progress underground results in different quantities annually. Separated by coarse and fine tailings, detection limits differ between the two types. Lab changed detection limits between the two samples collected. (Went from 0.15 to 0.10 for Coarse tailings and remained at 0.10 for Fine tailings).

Separated by coarse and fine tailings, detection limits differ between the two types. Lab changed detection limits between the two samples collected. (Went from 0.03 to 0.01 for Coarse tailings and 0.02 to 0.01 for Fine tailings).

comments.comment: Welding

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Less production in 2022 compared to 2021, reducing the volatile organic compound containing reagents used.

Variability in ore composition as borers progress underground results in different quantities annually. Separated by coarse and fine tailings, detection limits differ between the two types. Lab changed detection limits between the two samples collected. (Went from 0.3 to 1.0 for Coarse tailings and 0.2 to 1.0 for Fine tailings).
